sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113427" key="xarmoniko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χαρμονικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n113427.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pleasant,</tr_> paraphrase of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θυμήρης,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:274" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Par.Ptol.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">274</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
